category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Ethiopia ESA/CACEA conformity, energy label/MEPS, and import inspection requirements.

title.en: China-to-Ethiopia Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入埃塞俄比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入衣索比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Ethiopia's ESA/IEC-adopted standards (ES IEC 60335-2-24), CACEA/Ministry of Trade conformity and pre-shipment import inspection, energy-efficiency labelling/MEPS, and R-600a refrigerant requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与埃塞俄比亚ESA采纳IEC的标准（ES IEC 60335-2-24）、CACEA/贸易部符合性与装运前进口检验、能效标识/最低能效标准（MEPS）及R-600a制冷剂要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與衣索比亞ESA採納IEC的標準（ES IEC 60335-2-24）、CACEA/貿易部符合性與裝運前進口檢驗、能效標識/最低能效標準（MEPS）及R-600a製冷劑要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Ethiopian standards (ES/IEC adoptions), CACEA/Ministry of Trade conformity and import-inspection procedures, energy-label/MEPS thresholds, and refrigerant requirements with qualified professionals and the in-country importer before shipment via Djibouti or market placement in Ethiopia.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在经吉布提出货或在埃塞俄比亚投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及在地进口商核验现行埃塞俄比亚标准（ES/IEC采纳）、CACEA/贸易部符合性与进口检验程序、能效标识/MEPS门槛值及制冷剂要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在經吉布提出貨或在衣索比亞投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及在地進口商核驗現行衣索比亞標準（ES/IEC採納）、CACEA/貿易部符合性與進口檢驗程序、能效標識/MEPS門檻值及製冷劑要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator exporters to Ethiopia face four main compliance themes: (1) electrical safety to Ethiopian Standards adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (ES IEC 60335-2-24) overseen by the Ethiopian Standards Agency (ESA) — GB 4706.13/CCC is technically close (both derive from IEC 60335-2-24) but is not automatically accepted, and conformity is demonstrated through CACEA/Ministry of Trade import inspection rather than China's CCC mark; (2) energy efficiency label/MEPS — Ethiopia operates an energy-efficiency programme for appliances, so EU-style EPREL pre-registration does not exist but local label/MEPS requirements should be checked with the importer; (3) EMC — Ethiopia has no EU-style mandatory horizontal EMC regime for household appliances, so GB 4343.1 test data generally has no Ethiopian counterpart obligation; (4) refrigerant — R-600a is well-positioned, with charge documentation against IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA to be verified. Ethiopia is landlocked; goods route via Djibouti, and an in-country importer handles conformity and inspection. Grid is 220 V / 50 Hz (same 50 Hz as China; China's domestic three-phase is 380 V).
answer_first.zh: 向埃塞俄比亚出口家用电冰箱的中国制造商面临四大合规主题：（1）电气安全须符合埃塞俄比亚采纳IEC 60335-2-24的标准（ES IEC 60335-2-24），由埃塞俄比亚标准局（ESA）监管——GB 4706.13/CCC在技术上接近（两者均源自IEC 60335-2-24）但不被自动接受，符合性通过CACEA/贸易部进口检验而非中国CCC标志来证明；（2）能效标识/MEPS——埃塞俄比亚为器具设有能效计划，因此不存在欧盟式EPREL预注册，但应向进口商核实本地标识/MEPS要求；（3）电磁兼容——埃塞俄比亚对家用器具无欧盟式强制横向EMC制度，故GB 4343.1检测数据通常无对应的埃塞义务；（4）制冷剂——R-600a具备良好条件，须核实充注量文件是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA。埃塞俄比亚为内陆国，货物经吉布提运输，由在地进口商办理符合性与检验。电网为220 V/50 Hz（与中国同为50 Hz；中国国内三相为380 V）。
answer_first.zht: 向衣索比亞出口家用電冰箱的中國製造商面臨四大合規主題：（1）電氣安全須符合衣索比亞採納IEC 60335-2-24的標準（ES IEC 60335-2-24），由衣索比亞標準局（ESA）監管——GB 4706.13/CCC在技術上接近（兩者均源自IEC 60335-2-24）但不被自動接受，符合性通過CACEA/貿易部進口檢驗而非中國CCC標誌來證明；（2）能效標識/MEPS——衣索比亞為器具設有能效計畫，因此不存在歐盟式EPREL預登記，但應向進口商核實本地標識/MEPS要求；（3）電磁相容——衣索比亞對家用器具無歐盟式強制橫向EMC制度，故GB 4343.1檢測數據通常無對應的衣索義務；（4）製冷劑——R-600a具備良好條件，須核實充注量文件是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA。衣索比亞為內陸國，貨物經吉布提運輸，由在地進口商辦理符合性與檢驗。電網為220 V/50 Hz（與中國同為50 Hz；中國國內三相為380 V）。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment authority, or primary legal source preferred (ESA, CACEA/Ministry of Trade, IEC). Local PDFs not accepted. The in-country importer should confirm current import-inspection and labelling procedures.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
